{{Infobox group
| name = Shepherds (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shepherds are mages of the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shepherds are capable of casting spells.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Shepherds are individuals in black hoods who belong to the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shepherds can protect a [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
